lifecycle_stages.build: Compose chains, agents, and graphs that do the work.
lifecycle_stages.observe: Trace every retrieval, reasoning step, tool call, and decision.
lifecycle_stages.evaluate: Score outputs against datasets and rubrics before you trust them.
lifecycle_stages.deploy: Ship durable, stateful agents to production with scaling and human-in-the-loop.

categories.title: Core Ecosystem
categories.description: The four pillars you build on. LangChain gives you the components, LangGraph runs the stateful agent, Deep Agents is the batteries-included harness, and LangSmith observes and evaluates the whole thing.

resources.name: LangChain (Python)
resources.description: The core framework: models, prompts, retrievers, tools, and the `create_agent` building block that everything else sits on.

resources.name: LangChain.js
resources.description: The TypeScript/JavaScript port of LangChain for building agents in Node and the browser.

resources.name: LangGraph (Python)
resources.description: Low-level orchestration runtime for long-running, stateful agents. Durable execution, streaming, memory, and human-in-the-loop as first-class primitives.

resources.name: LangGraph.js
resources.description: The TypeScript implementation of the LangGraph runtime.

resources.name: Deep Agents
resources.description: The batteries-included agent harness on top of `create_agent`: built-in planning (write_todos), a virtual filesystem for context offloading, subagents with isolated context, and persistent memory. `pip install deepagents`.

resources.name: LangSmith
resources.description: Unified platform to trace, evaluate, and monitor LLM apps. The observe + evaluate half of the lifecycle, framework-agnostic.

resources.name: LangGraph Platform
resources.description: Managed deployment for LangGraph agents: horizontally scaling task queues, persistence, cron, and the Assistants API.

resources.name: LangChain Docs
resources.description: The unified documentation hub spanning LangChain, LangGraph, Deep Agents, and LangSmith.

categories.title: Official Tools & Prebuilt Agents
categories.description: First-party packages and tooling from LangChain that you drop in instead of writing from scratch.

resources.name: langgraph-supervisor
resources.description: Prebuilt hierarchical multi-agent pattern: a central supervisor routes work to specialized agents.

resources.name: langgraph-swarm
resources.description: Prebuilt swarm pattern where agents hand off control to each other and the system remembers who was last active.

resources.name: LangMem
resources.description: Long-term memory SDK: extract, store, and retrieve semantic, episodic, and procedural memories across threads.

resources.name: LangGraph Studio
resources.description: Visual IDE to run, debug, and time-travel through your LangGraph agent's state.

resources.name: langchain-mcp-adapters
resources.description: Use any Model Context Protocol (MCP) server's tools inside LangChain and LangGraph agents.

resources.name: Agent Chat UI
resources.description: Next.js chat front-end that talks to any LangGraph deployment out of the box, including streaming and interrupts.

resources.name: open-deep-research
resources.description: Open, configurable deep-research agent built on LangGraph — a reference implementation for multi-step research.

resources.name: openevals
resources.description: Ready-made evaluators (LLM-as-judge, exact match, structured) for grading LLM outputs in CI and LangSmith.

resources.name: agentevals
resources.description: Evaluators specialized for agent trajectories — judge tool-call sequences and multi-step decisions, not just final answers.

resources.name: LangGraph Bigtool
resources.description: Prebuilt LangGraph agent that scales tool use by retrieving relevant tools from a large registry via semantic search.

categories.title: Integrations
categories.description: The plug-in surface: model providers, vector stores, and tools that snap into LangChain via dedicated packages.

resources.name: Integrations Directory
resources.description: The canonical index of every provider, vector store, retriever, and tool integration.

resources.name: langchain-anthropic
resources.description: Claude model integration (chat, tool use, prompt caching).

resources.name: langchain-openai
resources.description: OpenAI and Azure OpenAI chat, embeddings, and tool-calling integration.

resources.name: langchain-google-genai
resources.description: Google Gemini and Vertex AI model integrations.

resources.name: langchain-aws
resources.description: Amazon Bedrock models, Kendra retrieval, and other AWS integrations.

resources.name: langchain-chroma
resources.description: Chroma vector store integration for local and embedded RAG.

resources.name: langchain-postgres (pgvector)
resources.description: Postgres + pgvector vector store and chat-history store.

resources.name: Tavily Search
resources.description: Search API built for agents; a common web-retrieval tool in LangGraph research agents.

categories.title: Templates & Starters
categories.description: Clone-and-go starting points. Most are LangGraph templates wired for LangGraph Studio and Platform.

resources.name: ReAct Agent Template
resources.description: The canonical tool-calling agent template — the fastest way to a working LangGraph agent.

resources.name: Retrieval Agent Template
resources.description: RAG agent scaffold with indexing and retrieval graphs ready to customize.

resources.name: Memory Agent Template
resources.description: Starter showing long-term memory with LangGraph's store and LangMem.

resources.name: Data Enrichment Template
resources.description: Agent that researches and fills structured records — a template for extraction pipelines.

resources.name: New LangGraph Project
resources.description: Minimal blank LangGraph project skeleton with config and CLI wiring.

resources.name: Chat LangChain
resources.description: Full reference RAG chatbot over the LangChain docs — production patterns end to end.

categories.title: Learning Resources
categories.description: Courses, tutorials, and channels to go from zero to shipping agents.

resources.name: LangChain Academy
resources.description: Free first-party courses, including the well-regarded Introduction to LangGraph.

resources.name: Deep Agents Overview (Docs)
resources.description: The official conceptual guide to what Deep Agents add over a bare agent.

resources.name: AI Agents in LangGraph (DeepLearning.AI)
resources.description: Short course building agents from scratch and then in LangGraph.

resources.name: LangChain Blog
resources.description: Release notes, design rationale, and case studies straight from the team.

resources.name: LangChain YouTube
resources.description: Walkthroughs, livestreams, and conference talks.

resources.name: LangSmith Evaluation Docs
resources.description: How to build datasets, run evaluators, and gate releases on quality.

categories.title: Community — RAG & Knowledge Assistants
categories.description: Real-world projects that retrieve over your data and answer questions.

resources.name: Onyx (formerly Danswer)
resources.description: Open-source AI assistant that connects to your company's docs and apps for grounded answers.

resources.name: Quivr
resources.description: Opinionated RAG framework and 'second brain' for plugging LLMs into your files.

resources.name: Verba
resources.description: Weaviate's open-source RAG application ('Golden RAGtriever') with a polished UI.

categories.title: Community — Research Agents
categories.description: Agents that plan, search the web, and synthesize long-form reports.

resources.name: GPT Researcher
resources.description: Autonomous agent that runs multi-source web research and produces cited reports; offers a LangGraph multi-agent variant.

resources.name: GPT Newspaper
resources.description: LangGraph agent that curates and writes a personalized newspaper from live sources.

resources.name: Local Deep Researcher
resources.description: Fully local web-research assistant on LangGraph that iteratively searches, summarizes, and fills knowledge gaps with any Ollama/LMStudio model.

categories.title: Community — Web & Browser Automation
categories.description: Agents that drive browsers and act on the live web.

resources.name: Browser Use
resources.description: Library that lets LLM agents control a real browser; integrates with LangChain models.

resources.name: LaVague
resources.description: Open-source Large Action Model framework that turns natural-language objectives into executed browser actions; integrates with LangChain.

categories.title: Community — Finance & Markets
categories.description: Agents applied to investing research and financial analysis.

resources.name: AI Hedge Fund
resources.description: Educational multi-agent system (built with LangChain/LangGraph) that simulates investing analysts and a portfolio manager.

resources.name: AI Financial Agent
resources.description: Proof-of-concept financial-analysis agent over market data and filings, built with LangChain and LangGraph.

categories.title: Community — Productivity & Personal Assistants
categories.description: Agents that handle email, scheduling, and everyday workflows.

resources.name: Executive AI Assistant
resources.description: Reference LangGraph email assistant that triages inbox and drafts replies with human-in-the-loop.

resources.name: Social Media Agent
resources.description: LangGraph agent that turns URLs into drafted social posts with human review.

categories.title: Community — Developer Tools & Coding Agents
categories.description: Agents that read, write, and ship code.

resources.name: Open SWE
resources.description: Open-source asynchronous coding agent built on LangGraph that plans and executes repo changes.
